failures.description: The required catalog search dependency timed out, so the agent could not obtain the evidence needed to answer the cheapest available Electric Kettle.
failures.checklist_reasoning: At index 3, the agent attempted the required ProductCatalogSearch call with well-formed arguments. The tool returned an explicit infrastructure/connectivity-style error: CatalogServiceTimeoutError, stating the catalog search dependency timed out after 30000ms. This is not a schema or malformed invocation issue, and the later steps did not resolve it; the agent simply produced an incomplete answer.
